headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Business First Bancshares (BFST) After Recent Analyst Updates
summary: The latest analyst update on Business First Bancshares keeps model fair value steady at US$32.88 while highlighting a US$31 price target that anchors the current valuation conversation. That target sits at the center of an active debate over how much of the bank’s balance sheet growth and the Oakwood and Progressive deals is already reflected in the share price, and how much depends on smooth execution ahead. As you read on, you will see how these shifting views are shaping the evolving...
